faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Springfield Gardens?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Springfield Gardens range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of ant species. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees and offer free estimates for all Springfield Gardens residents.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Springfield Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Springfield Gardens properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly problematic in older wooden structures, while pavement ants often infiltrate homes through foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment method.
